name: Factored linear expression
description: The expression 2(x+3), which reveals factor and grouping structure.

name: Expanded linear expression
description: The expression 2x+6, which reveals term structure.

name: Linear equation
description: The equation 3x+2=17, interpreted as a condition on x.

name: Linear function
description: The function f(x)=3x+2, interpreted as dependence of output on input.

name: Distributive identity
description: The identity a(b+c)=ab+ac, expressing structural relation between operations.

name: Arithmetic sequence
description: A sequence generated by a constant difference and represented algebraically.

name: Group-like structure
description: A system with an operation, identity, inverses, and associativity.
